spec_match.rationale: Six gates match the spec: secure context, COI, isolated-app://, ControlledFrame constructor, custom element, permissions-policy. Comprehensive.

interactive.rationale: Auto-runs on load and renders a checklist plus a verdict, but the second 'live-probe-panel' is a generic boilerplate block that probes unrelated APIs (CSS.supports, navigator.gpu, scheduler) — it's noise and reduces clarity.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises six gates with verdict; the primary panel delivers that.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers each gate individually; doesn't show the diagnostic order (which gate to fix first). A visitor with 2/6 doesn't know which to address — secure context is upstream of crossOriginIsolated, etc.

references.rationale: Links the IWA explainer but the see-also section is missing the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> URL — visitor has to navigate up to the feature index for that anchor.

design_system.rationale: Variables only, no raw hex, .yes/.no states use accent-emerald and accent-rose.

openQuestions.title: Remove the unrelated live-probe boilerplate
openQuestions.detail: The page includes a `data-live-probe` block that lists CSS.supports / navigator.gpu / PerformanceObserver — none of which gate Controlled Frame. It's templated boilerplate from another concept. Either remove it or replace it with Controlled-Frame-specific probes (e.g. `'execute' in HTMLElement.prototype` for executeScript).

openQuestions.title: Add a chromestatus link
openQuestions.detail: Per CLAUDE.md invariant 3, every concept page must include the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link as the recovery anchor for the slug cleanup script. The see-also section is missing it.

openQuestions.title: Recommend a fix order
openQuestions.detail: When N of 6 gates fail, surface the upstream-first recommendation: 'Fix isSecureContext before crossOriginIsolated before isolated-app://.' Make it an ordered list so visitors don't chase the wrong gate.

summary: Solid gate-by-gate diagnostic, marred by an unrelated boilerplate panel below it and a missing chromestatus link. Trim the noise and add the recovery anchor.
